title: Pole Too Short?! — Fail-to-Win Rooftop Run
hook_3s: A spinning saw slices the pole down to a stub mid-slide — the runner wobbles over a cyan skyline canyon as the screen freezes on "OH NO!"
scene_flow: 0-3s: Cold open mid-run on a white rooftop rail; a buzzing yellow saw swings in and SHEARS the pole down to a tiny stub. Freeze-frame wobble, comedic 'OH NO' overlay.
3-7s: 'Fail' replay — character teeters, slow-mo drop between two pastel skyscrapers. Big red 'DON'T DO THIS' stamp.
7-11s: Rewind whoosh. This time a finger-tap drags the runner through a stream of glowing pole pieces; the pole grows comically long, magenta sparkles trailing.
11-14s: Triumphant slide across THREE connected rails, ducking saws, diamonds vacuumed up, level bar fills to MAX with a satisfying chime.
14-15s: Logo lockup on cyan sky, CTA pulses.
visual_direction: Lock to Roof Rails' signature 3D minimalist look: chunky low-poly rooftops, stark #EAF6FA white paths, #5CD6FF cyan sky gradient, #FFC824 yellow accents on pole pieces and saws, magenta diamond pickups. Soft global lighting, no textures — just clean flat shading. Camera is the standard behind-the-shoulder Roof Rails follow-cam with a slight Dutch tilt on the fail beat for comedy. Keep HUD authentic: top-left diamond counter, top-center level progress bar, level indicator pill. Saw obstacles are flat yellow discs with triangular teeth, exactly as in-game.
rationale: Voodoo's current Roof Rails rotation is almost entirely no-copy gameplay videos and a single playable — there is zero "fail-first / wrong-way vs right-way" comedic framing in market, even though Fail · 3D-render is a proven scroll-stopper across casual UA. This brief imports that emotional pitch but anchors it to Roof Rails' actual saw-cuts-pole moment, so the hook is on-mechanic (no Gardenscapes cat detour) and the "DON'T DO THIS → DO THIS" structure doubles as a tutorial, lifting IPM for low-intent broad-casual traffic.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, aspect 9:16, in-game screenshot of Roof Rails: behind-the-shoulder view of a runner mid-slide on a stark white #EAF6FA rooftop rail between two low-poly pastel skyscrapers, bright cyan #5CD6FF sky gradient, a flat yellow #FFC824 circular saw with triangular teeth slicing the long balancing pole in half, glowing yellow pole-piece collectibles floating ahead, magenta diamond pickups, authentic HUD with top-center progress bar and top-left diamond counter and level indicator pill, 3D minimalist with simple geometry, bright pastel colors, and a clean, uncluttered aesthetic, bold white sans-serif on-screen text 'OH NO!' centered, no textures, soft global lighting

Storyboard frame 2, aspect 9:16, in-game Roof Rails moment: runner with a comically long horizontal balancing pole sliding across THREE parallel white rails connecting cyan #5CD6FF rooftops, a stream of yellow #FFC824 pole-piece collectibles being absorbed, magenta diamonds sparkling, two yellow saw obstacles dodged behind, top-center level progress bar nearly full, diamond counter visible top-left, 3D minimalist with simple geometry, bright pastel colors, and a clean, uncluttered aesthetic, on-screen text 'MAX POLE = WIN' in chunky yellow caps, clean #EAF6FA path, no textures

Storyboard frame 3, aspect 9:16, freeze-frame fail beat in Roof Rails: stubby cut-off balancing pole, runner teetering at the edge of a white #EAF6FA rooftop rail with a deep drop between pastel low-poly buildings under a #5CD6FF cyan sky, severed yellow pole pieces tumbling, slight Dutch-tilt camera, authentic HUD intact with progress bar and #FFC824 yellow level indicator, 3D minimalist with simple geometry, bright pastel colors, and a clean, uncluttered aesthetic, red stamp text 'DON'T DO THIS' overlaid, no textures, soft shadows
